data_coverage_summary: Salesforce APIs / Commerce APIs has public documentation that indicates commerce catalog and order workflows across products, customers, carts, orders. Public Salesforce API library.
buyer_guidance: Use this surface for ecommerce catalog, order, and checkout integration. It is a commerce workflow API rather than an asset or telemetry platform. Salesforce should be treated as a rest api surface for commerce catalog and order workflows.
overview: Public documentation reviewed for Salesforce APIs / Commerce APIs indicates Public Salesforce API library. The documented surface aligns with commerce catalog and order workflows and covers products, customers, carts, orders. Asset data is Unsupported. Telemetry data is Unsupported. Writeback is Supported.

available_data.description: The public documentation indicates commerce workflows for catalog, customers, checkout, orders, and storefront-linked actions.

ingest_considerations: The public source for Salesforce APIs / Commerce APIs is documentation-oriented, so live access still depends on vendor-issued credentials, tenant configuration, or customer enablement.
This row is modeled as commerce catalog and order workflows, so downstream integrations should scope data collection and writeback around those documented business workflows.
No exact public machine-readable JSON or YAML artifact was confirmed during this pass, so the documentation URL remains the primary evidence anchor.
